moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale, with golfers battling for the coveted Claret Jug in the final round.

angles.name: Live updates
angles.copy: It's the final day of The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale! Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug? Catch all the drama as it unfolds.

angles.name: Local interest
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major, The Open, wraps up today at Royal Birkdale. Are you tuning in from Devon to see who triumphs?

moments.title: F1 Belgian Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Belgian Grand Prix culminates today at Spa-Francorchamps, marking another thrilling race in the 2026 season.

angles.name: Race day excitement
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! It's race day at the Belgian Grand Prix. Who's taking the win at Spa today?

angles.name: Post-race reaction
angles.copy: What a race at Spa! Share your thoughts on all the drama from the Belgian Grand Prix. Did your driver deliver?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Final Day
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival concludes today at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring five stages of diverse music.

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: Last chance for Splendour Festival vibes! Who caught the best acts at Wollaton Hall today?

angles.name: Festival highlights
angles.copy: What were your Splendour Festival highlights this weekend? So many stages, so many great artists!

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and rock icon Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite May solo?

angles.name: Rock royalty
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to rock royalty Brian May, celebrating 79 today! An absolute icon.

moments.title: Fred again.. turns 33
moments.blurb: Acclaimed electronic music producer and DJ, Fred again.., celebrates his 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Electronic star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again..! What's the track of his that always gets you moving?

angles.name: Producer power
angles.copy: The man behind some of the biggest tracks and remixes, Fred again.. is 33 today! Let's celebrate his genius.

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays officially begin for many pupils in England and Scotland this week, joining Wales and Northern Ireland already on break.

angles.name: Holiday kick-off
angles.copy: And just like that, summer holidays are here for many across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local summer fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Wishing all the pupils in Wales a fantastic break. What exciting things are you getting up to?

angles.name: Devon summer plans
angles.copy: It's the start of summer holidays for many in Devon! Time for beaches, ice cream, and sunshine (hopefully!). What's on your summer bucket list?

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and blues, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar god
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready to crank up some of his timeless tracks.

angles.name: Timeless tracks
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring magic of Carlos Santana, who hits 79 tomorrow. What's your go-to Santana song?

moments.title: Kim Carnes turns 81
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 81st birthday to the iconic voice behind 'Bette Davis Eyes', Kim Carnes, tomorrow!

angles.name: Timeless vocals
angles.copy: Tomorrow we celebrate Kim Carnes' 81st birthday! Her distinctive voice remains a classic.

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, singer, songwriter, and drummer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: On Wednesday, the legendary Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79! Get ready for some classic rock anthems.

angles.name: Voice of an era
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Henley's 79th birthday on Wednesday. His voice is synonymous with some of rock's greatest hits.

moments.title: George Clinton turns 85
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer and Parliament-Funkadelic mastermind George Clinton celebrates his 85th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Funkadelic fun
angles.copy: Get ready to get down! The undisputed King of Funk, George Clinton, turns 85 on Wednesday. What's your favourite P-Funk track?

angles.name: Music legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the visionary George Clinton on Wednesday! His influence on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The multi-award-winning Latitude Festival kicks off on Thursday at Henham Park, Suffolk, offering music, comedy, arts, and more until Sunday.

angles.name: Festival gates open
angles.copy: Latitude Festival opens its gates on Thursday! Who's heading to Henham Park for a weekend of music and arts?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: It's almost time for Latitude Festival in Suffolk! Get ready for four days of incredible live performances and entertainment.

moments.title: Truck Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The independent Truck Festival returns to Hill Farm, Oxfordshire, on Thursday for a weekend of indie, rock, and alternative music.

angles.name: Indie festival kick-off
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back! The 'UK's best small festival' opens its doors on Thursday. Who's got their tickets for Hill Farm?

angles.name: Oxfordshire's big weekend
angles.copy: Get ready, Oxfordshire! Truck Festival starts Thursday, bringing a fantastic lineup of indie and rock to Hill Farm.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses and Velvet Revolver guitar icon Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Guitar hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash on Thursday! That top hat and those riffs are legendary.

angles.name: Rock legend
angles.copy: Thursday marks the 61st birthday of guitar legend Slash! What's your favourite GNR track featuring his iconic solos?

moments.title: F1 Hungarian Grand Prix Practice
moments.blurb: Practice sessions for the Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix kick off on Friday at the Hungaroring in Budapest, leading up to Sunday's race.

angles.name: F1 weekend starts
angles.copy: The F1 action continues this weekend in Hungary! Practice sessions begin on Friday at the Hungaroring. Who are you tipping for pole?

angles.name: Track analysis
angles.copy: First look at the Hungaroring on Friday as practice for the Hungarian Grand Prix gets underway. What are the key talking points from FP1 and FP2?

moments.title: Verdine White turns 75
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday, a founding member of the legendary funk band.

angles.name: Funk legend
angles.copy: On Saturday, the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75! His basslines are pure magic.

angles.name: Music icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to funk icon Verdine White on Saturday! Get ready to groove to some Earth, Wind & Fire this weekend.
